历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 2133 → 1685 → 974 → 726 → 531, showing a continuous and significant upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative advance of about 1602 positions over the past 5 years, and a baseline ranking of about 531 in 2025; the provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 78 in 2021 → 71 in 2022 → 50 in 2023 → 45 in 2024 → 20 in 2025, showing a continuous reduction trend; the 2026 plan maintains 20, unchanged from 2025, indicating the reduction trend has slowed.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university (C9 League member); in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it rose to 12th in 2026 (11th in 2021 → 13th in 2022 → 13th in 2023 → 16th in 2024 → 14th in 2025 → 12th in 2026), consistently ranking among the top nationwide; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, overall stable; Douyin popularity ranking 10th overall (rated high heat), with high short video exposure, and the National Defense Seven Sons label continues to attract attention; in 2024, there was a medium-attention abnormal admission signal (candidates reported a sharp drop in admission cutoff), but the ranking in 2025 has significantly recovered to 531, indicating that popularity has recovered; it has 17 A- and above disciplines, including A+ in Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, A in Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Instrument Science and Technology, etc., with extremely outstanding engineering strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., continue to be highly recommended with high social application popularity; the total number of candidates in Fujian Province for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 267,900, an increase of about 15,600 compared to 2025 (about 252,300), with an estimated 204,000 Physics Category candidates based on historical proportions, an increase of about 12,000 compared to 2025 (about 192,000), intensifying competition; Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, far from Fujian, but as a top C9 engineering university, it has strong cross-provincial appeal, and regional factors have limited impact on high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the strong momentum of continuous ranking advancement over the years, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the expansion of Fujian candidate scale intensifying competition, the stable or rising school ranking, and high Douyin exposure, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to advance slightly from the 2025 ranking of 531 (further intensifying competition), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 551, range 488–614.

It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 488 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship special classes (Top Class, Future Technology Top Talent Class, Academician Special Class); candidates with rankings between 488–551 should mainly target Tier 2, supplemented by Tier 1; candidates with rankings between 551–614 should mainly target Tier 2, with Tier 3 as a safety; candidates with rankings after 614 can consider Tier 3 majors as sprint targets.

历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1462 (Ideological and Political Group); in 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 1178, moving forward by about 284 places, indicating intensified competition. The enrollment plan for History Category increased from 6 in 2023 to 10 in 2025, and further to 12 in 2026, showing continuous expansion. In 2026, compared to 2025, the expansion is 20%, which helps alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university (C9 League member); ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top tier nationally. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, overall stable. Douyin popularity total list ranks 10th (high heat), and the label of National Defense Seven Sons continues to attract attention. HIT is strong in engineering, and the History Category enrollment major is the Economic Management Experimental Class, corresponding to Management Science and Engineering (A), Business Administration (not individually rated), etc. The overall strength is relatively strong but not the school's most flagship direction.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of Economics and Management is divided and wait-and-see, with moderate application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Fujian Province increased. Estimated by historical proportion, the number of History Category examinees is about 64,000, an increase of about 4,000 compared to 2025 (about 60,000), slightly intensifying competition. 预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend of rankings in 2025, the 20% expansion in 2026 to alleviate competition, and the increased number of examinees in Fujian Province intensifying competition, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 1334, with a range of 1182–1486.
